violations.text: Towels and an empty jug were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

2-door lowboy unit was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Establishment had already contacted service. Service is scheduled for tomorrow. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ice had been placed in this unit prior to inspection. Additional ice was added and temperature of unit observed at 41 degrees F at the end of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets of the 2-door lowboy unit and the prep unit were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gaskets must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The cutting board of the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Inspector reviewed process to set up sanitizing sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023
Splash guard needed between the mop sink and the prep table to protect against contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
Proper air gap is needed in the front plumbing area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
